Text: The Cosmic Exploration Initiative is now operational on other stars.

By speaking with Cruisingway, located near the <Emphasis>Galactic Way</Emphasis>, you may travel to other cosmic exploration zones.

■Changing Instanced Areas
During periods of congestion, cosmic exploration zones may be separated into instanced areas. You may travel to different instances by speaking with Cruisingway.

<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Cosmic Exploration Tokens<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> are awarded upon successful completion of certain difficult stellar missions.

These tokens can be exchanged for special rewards by speaking with Mesouaidonque.

Critical missions require you to craft or procure materials at a designated location. On Phaenna, you may speak with Lefleda at Glassblowers' Beacon to travel directly to the mission site while a red alert is active.
